scripts.test:load:small: pnpm build:load && docker run --rm --network host -v ./tests/load:/scripts -i grafana/k6 run --config /scripts/config/small.json /scripts/dist/campaign-api.js
scripts.test:load:medium: pnpm build:load && docker run --rm --network host -v ./tests/load:/scripts -i grafana/k6 run --config /scripts/config/medium.json /scripts/dist/campaign-api.js
scripts.test:load:large: pnpm build:load && docker run --rm --network host -v ./tests/load:/scripts -i grafana/k6 run --config /scripts/config/large.json /scripts/dist/campaign-api.js
scripts.test:load:mqtt: pnpm build:load && docker run --rm --network host -v ./tests/load:/scripts -i grafana/k6 run --config /scripts/config/small.json /scripts/dist/mqtt-fanout.js
scripts.test:load:full: pnpm build:load && docker run --rm --network host -v ./tests/load:/scripts -i grafana/k6 run --config /scripts/config/small.json /scripts/dist/full-flow.js
